topic: theo do u see whats inside written the files
summary: Theo confirmed reviewing "FULL SCRIPT Aisha ACTS 1-11.pdf," noting key opening scene details like QAZAR AL-ZAMAN, the subtly fading magical barrier, and specific merchant interactions involving saffron and bioluminescent beetles. Image assets `palace-exterior.png`, `aisha-locations.png` (with its broken hourglass), and character cards were also acknowledged for visual reference. The "Enhance Quality" file was identified as HTML code, not an executable skill definition, requiring plain text instructions for any image quality enhancement. The proposed next step is to continue focusing on an establishing shot of the city gates, incorporating the "fading magic" effect and bustling caravans for a 2x2 grid.
